name: Sun-Scribe Tahir
dialogue: Welcome, welcome — your boots are clean, which means you just arrived.
I am Tahir. I translate. I read the dunes the way some read clouds.
A tomb has surfaced beneath this city. Four guardians stand inside it.
Defeat the three trial-keepers — Khepri, Seshat, Sekhmet-Ra — and the Pharaoh himself will rise to meet you.
Watch your team! The desert sun blesses Fire and Light, but smothers Shadow and Ice. Bring the right friends.
And keep an eye out for Scarab Coins. The Pharaoh's currency. Worth more than gold to those who know what it once bought.
Now go. The sands won't wait forever.
